---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[REQUEST] <title of your feature request>"
labels: enhancement/under-review, status/new, type/enhancement
assignees: ByteKatana

---

**Problem Statement**
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.  (e.g: I'm always frustrated when ...)

**Proposed Solution***
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Alternative Solutions**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Use Case**
Describe who would benefit from this feature and how it would be used.

**Benefits**
Explain the value this adds to the project.

**Potential Drawbacks**
Are there any downsides or trade-offs we should consider?

**Implementation Ideas**
Optional: Any thoughts on how this could be implemented technically.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
